ticket.subject: Critical: Customers table corrupted after schema upgrade, 8,500+ records inaccessible
ticket.body: Our schema upgrade completed at 14:45 UTC and the customers table is now returning corruption errors on approximately 8,500 records. Queries are timing out and we're seeing integrity constraint violations. Can you confirm if point-in-time recovery is available for the past 6 hours on our project? We need to restore from backup immediately before our support team gets flooded with failed login reports. This is a data integrity emergency.
